hero.title: "Flip The Coin", the online game
hero.lead: Have you ever let fate decide for you? You certainly shouldn't!
home.features.title: Three ways to play with chance
home.features.play.title: Play
home.features.play.body: A 3D coin you can drag, spin, and flip — physics included.
home.features.read.title: Read
home.features.read.body: Probability, statistics, and the surprising history of the toss.
home.features.install.title: Install
home.features.install.body: Drop a coin into your browser. One click, anywhere.
home.recent.title: Latest from the blog
home.extension.title: Always one click away
home.extension.body: Install the extension and flip a coin from any tab. Same physics, same fairness, no installations of weird games.
